creator: Alexander Terp
description: parse_date() accepts format tokens but there is no inverse - no way to format an epoch/time map into a string like "ddd YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm". Scripts hand-roll zero-padding and string assembly. Either a format_epoch(epoch, fmt) builtin or a format param/fn on time maps. From #139 (time/date trio).
title: Epoch-to-string date formatting (inverse of parse_date)
